name: Authentication Module
description: Build login and registration functionality using Supabase authentication

name: Dashboard Module
description: Create a dashboard page with an overview of client and invoice data

name: Client Management Module
description: Develop a feature to add, edit, and delete client information

name: Invoice Management Module
description: Build functionality to create, edit, and delete invoices, including invoice items and totals

name: PDF Export Module
description: Implement a feature to export invoices as PDF documents

name: Data Integration Module
description: Integrate client and invoice data with Supabase database

name: UI Styling and Polish Module
description: Apply Tailwind CSS to style the application and add polish to the UI
